t.t-value: { 'draft': 'Draft', 'submitted': 'Submitted to HR', 'preparation': 'In Preparation', 'approval_1': 'Approval #1', 'approval_2': 'Approval #2', 'pending_payment': 'Pending Payment', 'active': 'Active', 'paid': 'Paid', 'cancelled': 'Cancelled', 'hr_review': 'HR Review', 'approved': 'Approved', 'waiting': 'Waiting', 'offered': 'Plot Offered', 'completed': 'Completed', 'removed': 'Removed', 'resigned': 'Resigned', 'terminated': 'Terminated', 'pending_approval': 'Pending Approval', 'posted': 'Posted', }

'bg-success' if state_value in ('active', 'approved', 'paid', 'completed', 'posted') else 'bg-warning text-dark' if state_value in ('submitted', 'hr_review', 'preparation', 'approval_1', 'approval_2', 'pending_payment', 'offered', 'pending_approval') else 'bg-danger' if state_value in ('cancelled', 'removed', 'terminated') else 'bg-secondary'

div.p: Your account is not linked to a Provident Fund member record. Please contact the HR department.

div.span: Loan applications require at least the minimum contribution months.

t.div:
No loan records found.
Apply for your first loan.
You need at least posted contribution months to apply for a loan. You currently have months.

div.label: Loan Amount (JOD) *
div.div: Maximum based on your balance: JOD. HR will verify your income capacity.
Income & Existing Commitments (optional – helps HR calculate your capacity)

div.label: Other Monthly Income (JOD)
div.div: Any income beyond your main salary.

div.label: This is a reschedule / buyout of an existing loan

form.p: Your application will be saved as a Draft. Use the Submit to HR button on the next page when you are ready to send it for review.

div.div: Your loan application has been saved as a draft. Review the details below and click Submit to HR when ready.

t.span: Your application is under review. Contact HR for updates.
You already have a withdrawal request in progress.
Not eligible to request a withdrawal at this time.

t.div:
No withdrawal records found.
Submit your first request.

You are not currently eligible to request a withdrawal.
50% withdrawal requires months (you have ).
75% withdrawal requires months.

You have an outstanding personal loan balance of
JOD . A 50% withdrawal will automatically settle your loan first; any remainder will be paid to you in cash.

input.name: withdrawal_type
input.t-att-checked: form_data.get('withdrawal_type','50') == '50' and can_50 and 'checked' or None

input.name: withdrawal_type
input.t-att-checked: form_data.get('withdrawal_type') == '75' and can_75 and 'checked' or None

div.label: Requested Amount (JOD) *
div.div: Enter an amount up to your eligible balance above.

form.p: Your request will be saved as a Draft. Use the Submit to HR button on the next page when you are ready to send it for review.

div.div: Your withdrawal request has been saved as a draft. Review the details below and click Submit to HR when ready.

t.span: Your request is under review. Contact HR for updates.

t.t-if: withdrawal.state in ('draft', 'hr_review', 'approval_1', 'approval_2') and withdrawal.withdrawal_type == '50' and withdrawal.is_loan_settlement

div.div: You may not make another 50% withdrawal until this date.

t.div: No resignation or settlement record found. If you have submitted a resignation please contact the HR department.

div.class: d-flex flex-wrap justify-content-between align-items-center gap-2 mb-3

div.div: Fraudulent Termination — only personal contributions are returned (0% company contributions and profits).
Your resignation record is under review. The settlement figures shown below are estimates and will be frozen at the time of approval.
Contributions up to this date are counted.

t.div: No profit distribution records found for your account yet.

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-4
div.div: This distribution is still under review. Profit amounts shown are provisional and may change before the Committee approves and posts the distribution.

dt.class: col-sm-6 text-muted fw-bold border-top pt-2 mt-1

div.p: Your profit is proportional to your average monthly balance relative to all members:

div.class: bg-light rounded p-2 font-monospace small mb-2

div.div:
Share % = Your Avg Balance ÷ Fund Total Avg Balance
Profit = Total Profit Pool × Share %
div.p: Average monthly balance is calculated from your posted contributions, prior profits, and approved withdrawals over the fiscal year.
